highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Saroj Institute of Technology and Management admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Saroj Institute of Technology and Management:

faqs.question: How to get a seat for admission at Saroj Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer:
Saroj Institute of Technology and Management offers various courses at the UG and PG level. The selection criteria are merit-based or entrance based as per course requirement. The application process at SITM Lucknow is conducted online. To secure a seat at Saroj Institute of Technology and Management, students can check the following steps presented below:
Visit the official website and complete the online application process. 
Candidates can also apply online for various courses.
Ensure eligibility and selection criteria for all programme.
The selection criteria is merit or entrance-based.
Upon selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

faqs.question: What is the fee of Saroj Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer:
SITM offers BTech, BPharma, MTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. The selection criteria are merit or entrance-based.The institute offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to BTech course at Saroj Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: For admission to the BTech course at Saroj Institute of Technology and Management, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course is entrance-based i.e., JEE Main and candidates must pass Class 12. The duration of the course is four years spread over eight semesters.

college_info.intro: Saroj Institute of Technology and Management offers various UG, PG, and Diploma programmes. These programs are offered in the streams of Engineering, IT and Software, Management, and Medicine and Health Sciences. The popular programmes include:

placements.overview:
Saroj Institute of Technology and Management has established an active training and placement cell. The cell bridges the gap between the students and the recruiters and provides placement assistance to the students. It also provides training and guidance to the students and contributes in the personality development of the students.

Companies such as Asian Paints, NIIT Technologies, Cognizant, HDFC Bank, Accenture, HCL, TCS, Flipkart, PayTM. Concentrix, BirlaSoft, CMC, and Aon Hewitt frequently visit SITM Lucknow for placements.

faqs.answer: A:    Saroj Institute of Technology and Management offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Phoenix It Solutions, Sbr & Company (Charted Accountant), Rml Avadh University, Amazon Transpotaion, Teerthanker Mahaveer University, Cmc Limited Bangalore, Grid Inddia Power Cable Pvt Ltd, Gndu Rc Sultanpur Lodhi.
faqs.question: Which companies generally recruit from Saroj Institute of Technology and Management?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Saroj Institute of Technology and Management courses are offered to students mainly in the fields of Engineering, IT and Software, Management, and Medicine and Health Sciences. The college offers various programmes at the UG and PG levels, along with diploma courses, and strives to provide a platform to achieve a rightful place in the scientific community to the budding research workers. Further, the Saroj Institute of Technology, Lucknow, offers courses to students in full-time mode and is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, with very good infrastructure and proper facilities.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students got placed from my course, with the highest package of 18 LPA and the lowest package of 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are MedPlus, Medicity, Cipla, and Mankind. Top roles offered in the college are B. Pharmacy, D. Pharmacy, B.Tech, polytechnic, MBA, MCA, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are different laboratories available for different subjects, classrooms are well-maintained with proper facilities like light, fan, AC, smart boards, and 2 libraries. Wi-Fi facility is also available. Hostel facilities are very good with proper rooms, quality of food is also very good. We receive various varieties of food to eat. College always conduct sports and games events for students as well as faculty members.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The best college in the world.

review_content.Placements: 70-80% of students in my course were placed, with the highest package being 6 lahks and the lowest 3 lakh, and the average is 4 lakh. Surya Pharma and MedPlus are the top recruiting companies. 80% of students received internships in-hospital training, and industrial visits to motivate pharmacy students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and laboratories are available with high quality. Classrooms are very good, clean, and well-maintained. The library is also well-maintained. Rooms are excellent, and one notable aspect is that each room has a fan and Wi-Fi. The quality of food provided is very good and nutritious.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Beautiful campus with decent placement. Overall best.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario at Saroj Institute of Technology and Management is quite decent, especially for the CSE and IT branches. In 2024, companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, and a few startups visited the campus. The highest package was 10 LPA, and the average stood around 4.2 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of our college campus is one of the best in Lucknow. We have a clean classroom, a clean campus and the best canteen. The hygiene in hostel food. In our Saroj Institute of Technology and Management campus, they provide almost all the courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: For the pharmacy course, it is the best.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in the course is approximately 90%. The package offered ranges from 5-10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Aragen, INTO, Indegene, Macleods Pharmaceuticals Ltd., and Fortis Healthcare. The top role offered in the course is digital marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is top-notch. Classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled and the rooms are fully air-conditioned. The library has all essential notebooks and labs are equipped with every mechanical software needed. Canteen facilities are top-notch infrastructure. Currently, in Lucknow, it is one of the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college offers everything to me.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in the course is above 85%. The top companies that came for placements are Indegene, Intas, Fortis Healthcare, and Corpseed. The top roles offered in the course are medico marketing, medical writing, and pharmacist.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are present with digital classrooms. Facilities in the hostel are top-notch with a water cooler, refrigerator, and fully air-conditioned rooms. The food quality offered in the mess is top-notch. Medical facilities are offered inside the hostel campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good for regular students. For a bright future of students, it is a good choice.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of placements in the college is above 90%. Many students are already placed with great jobs. Companies like Max Hospital and Wellsun hire students. It is good for pharmacy students and also comfortable for students. The package offered ranges from 5-6 LPA. It provides very good opportunities for students to improve their skills. It provides a good and bright future. I like the Saroj Institute.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college fee is 1.03 LPA and the hostel fee is Rs. 65,000 per year. It has totally the best facilities. It is a good place. The quality of the food is very good and there is a very rotation shift food and on Sunday, we compulsory get paneer. Paneer is also good in the mess. The food and quality of the food are of very top quality. In labs, all instruments are very useful.

admission_process.title: Saroj Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Saroj Institute of Technology and Managementadmission 2025is open for various courses. SITM offers BTech, BPharma, MTech, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. The selection criteria are merit or entrance-based. To get admitted to Saroj Institute of Technology and Management, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atSaroj Institute of Technology and Managementis conducted online. Read the article to know more about theSaroj Institute of Technology and Managementcourse admission2025.

SITM Lucknow admission 2025is a mix of merit or entrance-based. The university offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Check out the following table for details aboutSITM Lucknow course admissions2025:
Particulars
SITM Lucknow Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

SITM course admissionis completely merit-based & Entrance exam-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the college must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Candidates looking for course admission must complete Class 12 in one attempt. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of theSaroj Institute of Technology and Management courses:
CUET/UPTACcounselling
Merit-based/*CUET-PG
Merit0-based

Saroj Institute of Technology and Management admissionsare a mix of entrance and merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Saroj Institute of Technology and Management is as follows:
STEP 1: Saroj Institute of Technology and Management Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://seglko.org/. Candidates have to fill up all the details carefully, such as name, mobile number, name of the state, etc. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute considers various entrance exam scores, such as JEE Main, CUET, etc for admission to the BTech, BPharma among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSaroj Institute of Technology and Management feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, with very good infrastructure and proper facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are different laboratories available for different subjects, classrooms are well-maintained with proper facilities like light, fan, AC, smart boards, and 2 libraries. Wi-Fi facility is also available. Hostel facilities are very good with proper rooms, quality of food is also very good. We receive various varieties of food to eat. College always conduct sports and games events for students as well as faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in the world.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and laboratories are available with high quality. Classrooms are very good, clean, and well-maintained. The library is also well-maintained. Rooms are excellent, and one notable aspect is that each room has a fan and Wi-Fi. The quality of food provided is very good and nutritious.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful campus with decent placement. Overall best.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our college campus is one of the best in Lucknow. We have a clean classroom, a clean campus and the best canteen. The hygiene in hostel food. In our Saroj Institute of Technology and Management campus, they provide almost all the courses.

reviews.review_heading: For the pharmacy course, it is the best.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is top-notch. Classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled and the rooms are fully air-conditioned. The library has all essential notebooks and labs are equipped with every mechanical software needed. Canteen facilities are top-notch infrastructure. Currently, in Lucknow, it is one of the best.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers everything to me.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are present with digital classrooms. Facilities in the hostel are top-notch with a water cooler, refrigerator, and fully air-conditioned rooms. The food quality offered in the mess is top-notch. Medical facilities are offered inside the hostel campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for regular students. For a bright future of students, it is a good choice.
reviews.review_text: The college fee is 1.03 LPA and the hostel fee is Rs. 65,000 per year. It has totally the best facilities. It is a good place. The quality of the food is very good and there is a very rotation shift food and on Sunday, we compulsory get paneer. Paneer is also good in the mess. The food and quality of the food are of very top quality. In labs, all instruments are very useful.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are present with digital classrooms. Facilities in the hostel are top-notch with a water cooler, refrigerator, and fully air-conditioned rooms. Sports are played by students such as volleyball, basketball, and cricket. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are available. Labs are conducted properly and the library is best where the study is done peacefully. The food quality is very good, and if we have any problem, then medical facilities are available. Sports are performed and sports events are conducted. There are games so we have more fun.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms are present with digital classrooms. Facilities in the hostel are top-notch with a water cooler, refrigerator, and fully air-conditioned rooms. Sports are played by students such as volleyball, basketball, and cricket. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned with smart board facilities. The hostel is decent with all amenities such as a geyser, water cooler, refrigerator, etc. I had the best hostel life and the warden is too good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for academics.

We have well-equipped labs, a canteen facility, a library facility and a sports facility which help as an extracurricular activity for students. A good drinking water facility is also being provided. There are CCTV cameras on the whole campus and Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for future.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available at this college are so good and fully Wi-Fi campus, smart classes, and smart and AC library. The hostel facilities are so good like AC rooms fully Wi-Fi and hygiene maintained, a clean kitchen, and security is very tight.

review_content.Placements: Campus placements here are very good. After completing the 5th-semester examinations, students are eligible for placements. MNCs come here for placements every year. Lots of students get good packages in placements. In the previous year, HCL visited the campus. They selected 18 students, and the minimum package offered was 5 LPA to 6 LPA after BBA in Jamia Hamdard.
review_content.Infrastructure: A social group called Asshman Foundation is present for the empowerment of poor children. Lots of students raise funds for unprivileged children. The campus has a huge library for all students, and they can go there anytime to learn new things and read books by great authors. The campus has a basketball team that plays with the National University team, and you can also participate in basketball. Cricket matches are also organized by Jamia authority, and you can easily participate in indoor and outdoor games.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college in Delhi. It is a deemed university and provides over 100 courses.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students are placed every year with the help of the placement cell inside the campus. The package is from 3 to 15 LPA are provided by companies to students of this university. HCL, Tech Mahindra, and other big companies come every year for placements inside the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and infrastructure are also good. The campus environment is very decent. It is a safe environment with no ragging inside the campus. Good food and playgrounds for all sports are available. The campus is vast, having a variety of grounds and a sports complex. Hostel facilities are also very good, with a separate hostel for international students.

individual_reviews.title: About Jamia Hamdard New Delhi.

content.Placements: Up to 70 % percent of the students get campus placements. Airtel, IBM, Wipro, TCS, give us the jobs and internships too. Cannot say anything much about the placement because I am in my second year of BCA but I am writing this on behalf of my senior who told me about this.
content.Infrastructure: College's classroom and labs are highly equipped with technology and they are providing Wi-Fi and LAN all over the university with very high quality network strength. Canteens are provided by every section of studies and on all the floors. They also provide recharge zone in every holding stop.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure, good facilities, and a great campus life.

content.Placements: There were no placements in our course. About 75% of students got internships at Brototype and Riss Technologies. Some of the roles offered were in full-stack development, front-end development, back-end development, software development, cyber security, ethical hacking, AI, and networking.
content.Infrastructure: Some of the facilities available were labs, classrooms, and libraries. The quality of the facilities was amazing. The food available in the canteens was tasty.
content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful and qualified. They had amazing teaching qualities. The course curriculum was relevant. Semester exams were not that hard. The pass percentage was almost 75%. If any students were weak in their studies, they would be given more attention to make them better at studying.

reviews_list.review_title: Good PG seats, okay infrastructure, and facilities in the hostel.

review_content.Placements: 150 students were enrolled, and we were paid only 15,000 for our internship, which is actually very less for the work we have been doing. Category A gets almost 100 percent of the amount, while B and C categories receive a little less for their internships. There are also not many patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, but we don’t have a good network connection as it is on the outskirts of town. The hostel is okay with bad water supply but has good washrooms. The single rooms are good, though the fees are a little high. Overall, I would rate it a 5/8.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with great amenities.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate has increased a lot since last year despite covid. The highest package offered was around 50 LPA (off-campus) and 22 LPA (on-campus). The average package is 10 LPA. Everyone who registered in the placement cell got placed on campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is great and has all the required facilities. The classrooms are good and clean. The library and laboratories are satisfying. There is a football ground, badminton court, basketball court, volleyball court and a gym as well. Campus and living spaces are clean and hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of my friends and some faculty.

review_content.Placements: As we are medical colleges no companies would recruit us. All students prefer and get prepared for PG seats.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our facility is good and infrastructure is very bad, it should develop very well and labs are not bad. Quality of food is bad in our college mess. No sport events are held in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful at all time. They are well qualified and knowledgeable. Some faculty teaching level is different and some are bad. Course curriculum is relevant and it make us ready for the profession.

review_summary.college_name: Viswabharathi Medical College and General Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Viswabharathi Medical College and General Hospital.

content.Placements: The highest package is 1 crore 35 lacs for the MBBS course. It is not worth joining this college because of poor infrastructure, and most of the accidents occur in this area of our college. There is no proper road or transport; recently an accident occurred on our college road, and two students are in critical condition.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very poor. The building is weak, and there are no proper drinking facilities for water; there is only one water fridge for the whole campus and hostel. There is no proper road for transportation. Most of the accidents occur near our college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 99% of students were placed in the MBBS course. The highest package is 6 Lacs per month, and the lowest is 80,000 rupees per month. I don't know how many companies are recruiting for my course, but 98% of students got internships in other private hospitals. The top role is working in the oncology department.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not too bad, but okay. Facilities are good, with good labs, classrooms, and a library. No Wi-Fi is available here in this college. Hostel facilities are good, but the fee for the hostel is not worthy. My college mess is very good, and it’s really worthy of your money.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good PG seats, okay infrastructure, and facilities in the hostel.

content.Placements: 150 students were enrolled, and we were paid only 15,000 for our internship, which is actually very less for the work we have been doing. Category A gets almost 100 percent of the amount, while B and C categories receive a little less for their internships. There are also not many patients.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, but we don’t have a good network connection as it is on the outskirts of town. The hostel is okay with bad water supply but has good washrooms. The single rooms are good, though the fees are a little high. Overall, I would rate it a 5/8.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with great amenities.

content.Placements: The placement rate has increased a lot since last year despite covid. The highest package offered was around 50 LPA (off-campus) and 22 LPA (on-campus). The average package is 10 LPA. Everyone who registered in the placement cell got placed on campus.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is great and has all the required facilities. The classrooms are good and clean. The library and laboratories are satisfying. There is a football ground, badminton court, basketball court, volleyball court and a gym as well. Campus and living spaces are clean and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of my friends and some faculty.

content.Placements: As we are medical colleges no companies would recruit us. All students prefer and get prepared for PG seats.
content.Infrastructure: Our facility is good and infrastructure is very bad, it should develop very well and labs are not bad. Quality of food is bad in our college mess. No sport events are held in our college.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful at all time. They are well qualified and knowledgeable. Some faculty teaching level is different and some are bad. Course curriculum is relevant and it make us ready for the profession.

highlights.summary:
The GPAT 2026 application form for admission to the MPharma course is expected to be released during the first week of April 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good college.

review_content.Placements: About 70 to 80% of the students are placed in our college. The highest and the lowest salary packages offered are 6 LPA and 4 LPA respectively. The average salary package offered is about 5 LPA. Almost 80% of students got internships. Several important roles like a pharmacist are offered by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided are pretty good. Infrastructure is very good and attractive. There are all facilities like good classrooms, library, labs, etc. There is no hostel for boys, however, there is a girls hostel.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers here are quite helpful. They solve the queries of students and are corporate enough. They are too humble so that every student can reach them with no hesitation. This course curriculum is relevant and professional also. Semesters are difficult in their increasing order.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college because my only goal is to learn pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students were placed, and the average salary pacakge offered ranges from 5 LPA - 6 LPA. Around half of the students got internships. Teachers guided students towards their bright future and solved all queries related to internships, placements, etc. The top roles were pharmaceutical analysis and medicinal pharmacy.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities were good. There was a library, well-mannered class, laboratories, and garden. Wi-Fi was not available, and the infrastructure was good. Hostel facility was also not available. The food quality was good. Medical facilities were available. The sports facilities were good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has won a grant of 15 lacs.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide any placement guarantee to students. However, it has a placement cell, which assists students in guidance and preparing them for placements or interviews in pharma companies. From our batch, most of the students are doing postgraduation after B.Pharmacy. However, students who wish to do jobs after B.Pharmacy are well placed in pharma companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of food served is quite impressive in the canteen and in the mess as well.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are quite good here, and they have high industrial knowledge as well as theoretical knowledge of the course. Most of the faculty members are PhD holders and have good experience in the pharma industry. They are helpful in all situations, especially in practical examinations, as in B.Pharmacy, practical examinations are very important for every student. For that, faculty members provide you with every assistance you need during your graduation. They are also helpful in project works or in any industrial guidance.

faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates preparing for the NEET exam to seek admission into Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole must possess minimum 50 percentiles in class 12 to be eligible for the NEET exam. So,  75 percentiles are more than enough to get into the college via NEET exam. Candidates can further check out more about the NEET UG eligibility criteria:Below are the NEET 2024 eligibility criteria with respect to the educational background or marks obtained in the qualifying exam.Candidates must have passed Physics,  Chemistry,  Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects individually in the qualifying examination.Candidates must have studied this subject as core or additional subjects.Candidates belonging to the General category must have scored a minimum of 50 per cent in the qualifying examination.Candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribes/ Other Backward should have a minimum score of 40 per cent in the qualifying examination.Candidates, who belong to the General category and are applying under the Persons with Disability (PWD) Quota, must have a minimum score of 45 per cent marks in the qualifying examination.

reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the faculty members, education, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not provided in our college and companies don't visit our college to recruit students. The roles offered in this course are general physician and PHC. Students of this course can also run clinics. Students can pursue specialisations in oncology and dermatology.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has 38 acres of land. It is a government medical college that consists of laboratories, a skill lab, a library, a canteen, and common rooms. There are separate hostels for girls and boys on campus. Hostels serve good and hygienic food items with comfortable dining rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides good teaching faculty members and has best infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Medical college cannot have placements, but they will get jobs once the course is completed. The course of internships of one year need to be completed, and it is a long duration unlike engineering colleges where there is no pressure to take PG as a post graduate study, but in medical field where they cannot even see students without any PG certificate.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college provides laboratories and museums. The Wi-Fi is also good along with fine administrative office section. It also has good facility in hostel. The canteen is also fine and provides healthy food. Sports are available like cricket, football, basketball, and volleyball. It is the best place to enjoy and study for the best memories.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a government college with good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: There will be no placements as such in the medical field like other streams, most of them go to pursue higher degrees like PG, and some of them join in pharmacy or as junior residents in hospitals. As per my knowledge, they are getting around Rs.60000 per month as medical officers.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we get average facilities with clean rooms without Wi-Fi, labs with sufficient resources, and a good library. Hostel facilities are good. The food quality is not so good so we need to adjust. Overall, college infrastructure is average. Hostel facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college regarding faculty and infrastructure .

content.Placements: A total of 120 members are placed in MBBS course. There are no specific placements in this college as it is a medical college. The internship is done here itself in the Government medical college, ongole and a stipend of 22k is provided for the house surgeons.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has labs for all subjects. Nice infrastructure in labs and galleries. In total, we have 4 galleries where the classes will be held. Out of 4, one is the main gallery the conference are held. It is a good college with good facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college offered good academics and surgical exposure.

content.Placements: I was from the 2015 batch. Overall, it was a very good college. It was good in academics. Our seniors got placed at VMMC, AIIMS PGI, etc., in very prestigious institutes. For internship, we have a beautiful and hectic GMC, Ongole. Surgical exposure at the internship level was too good.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was far better than any other college in Andhra Pradesh. We had a gym, TV room, indoor games room, and library. There was no Wi-Fi. You can modify the room as you want like air-conditioning and tables. They provided a bed, table, and chair. The mess was okay.

description: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23089 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole MBBS cutoff 2025 was 23089 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23253 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
The 3rd round of seat allotment for Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been announced for MD, MS programmes for various categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 3879 to 124172, with MD in General Medicine being the most challenging for admission. To see more information, students can check out the table below.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in General Medicine, with a round 3 closing rank of 3879 for the General AI category. In contrast, the cutoff for the OBC AI category for the same specialisation was 5100.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole offers a variety of MD and MS courses via the Andhra Pradesh NEET PG exam. Considering the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole cutoff 2022, the last-round cutoff ranged between 68795 and 125674 for the General AI category candidates. Wherein, MD in Physiology stood as the toughest course to get into Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole. Similarly, the easiest course was MD in Pharmacology for the General AI category

The Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Ongole released its round-wise cutoff 2023 for candidates seeking admission to various MBBS course. For the General AI category candidates, the MBBS course cutoff stood at 31214. Similarly, the 2022 and 2021 cutoff stood at 34191 and 28194, respectively. fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, New Delhi YMCA, Institute for Career Studies offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Humanities & Social Sciences, Hospitality & Travel and Science. College offers UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like PG Diploma. The New Delhi YMCA, Institute for Career Studies course fee ranges between INR 5,437 to 81,192.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing experience and exposure to health industry the course gives.

review_content.Placements: Around 16 girls were placed and most of them are doing internship. Dietitian roles are offered. Blk, apollo, st. stephens are some top recruiters. 50% are doing internship. review_content.Infrastructure: As we were pursuing course during covid times, so all classes were held online and were amazing. Infrastructure was pretty well. Not lived in hostel or campus as I am from Delhi itself so was not needed. Though the campus was quite big and everyone was friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nutrition Dietitian and Health Management - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: YMCA is one of such institute that can lay a stepping stone in one's ambition to be self employed.

content.Placements: The institute gives 100percent placement guarantee. No campus interview was conducted for this particular course. But most of the students went for internship. Due to COVID situations I didn't try for internship. But 90% students could get internship.
content.Infrastructure: The Institute has sufficient place and classrooms for various courses. The available infrastructure is very nice and even It has its own library and even computer labs. Hostel is available for other courses, no hostel facility for the students of this course.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nutrition Dietitian and Health Management - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: College is good. Faculty is good.

content.Placements: Around 50% placed. I have no idea of the highest or the lowest packages offered but 50% got internship. Initially as an intern in an hospital we had joined. Companies like healthify, hearbalife, Instafitness, hospitals like BLKapur, medanta, max, apollo have been on top priority.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom was fine never explored other things because it was a short term course and I was doing it with my work hand in hand so didn't had too much to explore canteen was decent. I was into Diploma course which was for an year so didn't get too much into other things.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nutrition Dietitian and Health Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Amazing experience and exposure to health industry the course gives.

content.Placements: Around 16 girls were placed and most of them are doing internship. Dietitian roles are offered. Blk, apollo, st. stephens are some top recruiters. 50% are doing internship. Roles as nutritionist are offered from the course done. Internship as dietitian. One can be entreprenure after doing course in health industries.
content.Infrastructure: As we were pursuing course during covid times, so all classes were held online and were amazing. Infrastructure was pretty well. Not lived in hostel or campus as I am from Delhi itself so was not needed. Though the campus was quite big and everyone was friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Certificate in Air Travel Fares and Ticketing - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: The placements are expected to be good by the end of this course. It is one of the best colleges in Delhi, and also the quality of the learning environment is absolutely worth it. It is highly recommended for every student.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The campus environment is the best and supportive. The classrooms are well-ventilated, and the staff are also very good. There's also a good ground, where we can get good sunlight. The location is good, and many eating spots are available around.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Travel Tourism and Airport Handling - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: YMCA New Delhi is a good college.

content.Placements: I am from batch no 182 in the travel tourism and airport handling course. Placements of YMCA are good, but due to the pandemic, many students did not get recruited. Salary packages were not offered by the institute. None of the students got internships. TTAH is one of the valuable courses, but due to the pandemic, the scope of the travel industry got down.
content.Infrastructure: The department has a very good infrastructure with many facilities like a library, computer labs and fully air-conditioned classrooms. Wi-Fi was not available, and the canteen was also not available. Our college provides many types of sports activities like basketball, swimming pool, etc.

reviews.review_heading: YMCA is one of such institute that can lay a stepping stone in one's ambition to be self employed.
reviews.review_text: The Institute has sufficient place and classrooms for various courses. The available infrastructure is very nice and even It has its own library and even computer labs. Hostel is available for other courses, no hostel facility for the students of this course.

reviews.review_heading: College is good. Faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: Classroom was fine never explored other things because it was a short term course and I was doing it with my work hand in hand so didn't had too much to explore canteen was decent. I was into Diploma course which was for an year so didn't get too much into other things.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing experience and exposure to health industry the course gives.
reviews.review_text: As we were pursuing course during covid times, so all classes were held online and were amazing. Infrastructure was pretty well. Not lived in hostel or campus as I am from Delhi itself so was not needed. Though the campus was quite big and everyone was friendly.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The campus environment is the best and supportive. The classrooms are well-ventilated, and the staff are also very good. There's also a good ground, where we can get good sunlight. The location is good, and many eating spots are available around.

reviews.review_heading: YMCA New Delhi is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The department has a very good infrastructure with many facilities like a library, computer labs and fully air-conditioned classrooms. Wi-Fi was not available, and the canteen was also not available. Our college provides many types of sports activities like basketball, swimming pool, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with everything, and placements are not provided.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not at all good. At the time of my admission, we were told that there would be swimming classes as a part of the course, but it was not done. We were told that we would be taken to the airport to see all the things done there, and that was also not done.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience was good. If you want to learn a language, you can join that course.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very nice and completely air-conditioned, which is a good thing. Classrooms, library and everything are just amazing and completely air-conditioned. The canteen is also pretty nice, and overall the experience was good. The library has many books, including audio, which is an advantage. You can issue books as per your need. Everything is neat and clean here.

reviews.review_heading: Superlative and splendid.
reviews.review_text: I've never seen before the infrastructure similar to YMCA anywhere during my entire career. I spent my golden memories at YMCA New Delhi. All the facilities like, sports, food, games, medical facilities were superb. I enjoyed so many games with my friends and also the library of YMCA is superior.

reviews.review_heading: Good work, just need to focus on placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were quite good, they have ACs and well-equipped classrooms. They also provide library facilities to those who are interested in reading. They have one mini canteen too but in my opinion, they can do much better with that canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of no placement criteria.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Air-conditioned classrooms were available for our batch. There was a huge library for students in a well organised manner. Quality of food in canteen was also good and not much expensive. Sports activities were available for interesting students.

reviews.review_heading: I am really happy and satisfied being a student of YMCA. I will surely recommend this institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of YMCA is worth appreciating. Every class has adequate number of chairs. Each class has 2 ACs. The department is always concerned about the cleanliness. Food in the canteen is provided at a reasonable amount and is upto the mark. Library is useful at the time of gaining extra knowledge or while giving exams. The yearly festival of YMCA allows each student to showcase their talents and interests.

reviews.review_heading: The education of YMCA is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, library is so amazing, infrastructure is quite good and the teachers of YMCA are excellent. Method of teaching is very nice. Here sports facilities like cricket, tennis, football, etc. are provided. Canteen is nice.

reviews.review_heading: All about my journey at YMCA.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the services provided by YMCA are upto the mark. Facilities provided to the students include computer laboratory, ground, canteen, classrooms, etc. YMCA, Delhi has one of the best infrastructures among the institutions in Delhi.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by the teachers and campus. I hope to get a good placement too.

admission_process.title: Senghundhar College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Senghundhar College of Pharmacy admission 2025is open. The college provides undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral programmes in the field of Pharmacy. Admission to the programmes is done on the basis of academic merit secured by the candidates in the last qualifying exam. The admission and application process forSenghundhar College of Pharmacycommences online. Students are offered the programmes in affiliation with theTamil Nadu Dr MGR Medical University. Students can read the following article to know in-depth about the programmes, eligibility, selection criteria and admission procedure for Senghundhar College of Pharmacy.

Senghundhar College of Pharmacy course admissionis merit-based. Students are offered BPharma, DPharma, MPharma, and PharmD programmes at the college. Interested students can visit the official website of the college to apply for the programme of choice by filling out the online application form. Aspirants can look at the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forSenghundhar College of Pharmacy courses:

The admission procedure for Senghundhar College of Pharmacy involves several steps, such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. Since admissions are merit-based, students need not appear in any entrance exams. The admission process is conducted online. Interested students can follow the step-by-stepSenghundhar College of Pharmacy admission process:
Step 1:Senghundhar College of Pharmacy Application Process

Aspirants can visit the official website of Senghundhar College of Pharmacy and click on the "Apply Now" tab to start the application process. Students need to duly fill out the form with all the required information, such as name, phone number, email ID, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Social Work (MSW) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bishop Heber College, Social Work Department.

content.Placements: All seniors get placed except for two. There are some campus placements, but most of them get placed outside campus. The starting salary ranges from Rs. 20,000 to 2–4 LPA based on the recruitment. You can be placed as a social worker, therapist, counsellor, community developer, human resources manager, or human resources executive.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and hostels are average compared to other colleges. The library is very good with an e-library. There is a very good canteen and sports facilities. You can even get a sports scholarship. Free Wi-Fi is available if you have a laptop. There are very good computer labs and other labs, such as a botany lab and labs for visual communication.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The ambiance is too good.

content.Placements: 55% of the students are placed in MNCs or IT companies. 10 LPA is the lowest package. The placements are good. The students must get internships, and they need to add to their resumes. We get wonderful placements. This college is referred to by all the students.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available in the whole college and hostels. It provides good communication. They are giving more importance to sports, NCC, and NSS. There are camps, and field work is more important. There are more than 30 clubs at the college. I truly recommend this college. Canteen is too good.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on the college campus, but it is only for study-related searches. Classrooms are sufficient for all the students, and the infrastructure is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are very good here, and the hostel food is good; canteen food is also good.

content.Placements: Placements are good, as many companies and banks come for campus recruitment and offer good jobs with on-the-spot offer letters. individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities were good. Annual placements of students were available through campus interviews. Job opportunities were basically made for the people who had good scores. Many companies and even MNCs were here for campus interviews. Students were trained for campus interviews, and the placement was guaranteed. A lot of international chains like Starwood, IHG, Hyatt, TCS, Accenture, etc. Average package was upto 4 LPA, and the highest package range was 9 LPA - 10 LPA from premium companies. 80% of students got final placements. All the students who had completed first year were required to undergo 2 months internship program.

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, Bishop Heber College outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook-ICARE ranking system. In the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Bishop Heber College's rank is #55, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Commerce' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Bishop Heber College's rank is #59, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It can be seen that; in the 'Social work' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Bishop Heber College's rank is #29, the same as last year's rank in the 'Social work' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bishop Heber College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bishop Heber College, Social Work Department.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and hostels are average compared to other colleges. The library is very good with an e-library. There is a very good canteen and sports facilities. You can even get a sports scholarship. Free Wi-Fi is available if you have a laptop. There are very good computer labs and other labs, such as a botany lab and labs for visual communication.

reviews.review_heading: The ambiance is too good.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the whole college and hostels. It provides good communication. They are giving more importance to sports, NCC, and NSS. There are camps, and field work is more important. There are more than 30 clubs at the college. I truly recommend this college. Canteen is too good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the college campus, but it is only for study-related searches. Classrooms are sufficient for all the students, and the infrastructure is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are very good here, and the hostel food is good; canteen food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bishop Heber College.
reviews.review_text: The MBA course is divided into 4 semesters, out of which the 1st 2 semesters improve your basic skills, whereas the last 2 semesters focus on your professional skills. The course structure is simplified for students, and the faculty are well qualified and have good experience in the sector they teach. Every semester is dedicated to different management subjects as per the designed course. Hostel facilities are nice; 24*7 electricity and water are available, along with other requirements like a m...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: It covered the basic requirement from where we could switch to any technology we wanted to switch for any specialisation. Lab counselling classes were provided at the study center, but regular practice of classes was required to score good marks. Hostel rooms were good, and the space was enough. It had two fans and two lights, and also charging ports. Mess food was also good. Hot and cold water for drinking was available at any time. Mineral water was also available. Hot water for bathing was av...

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are available at walking distance, and food and facilities provided for students are good. Food quality in the mess is also good. Inter-hostel tournaments are played every year. Hostels are clean and maintained in good condition. Rooms are for two people.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in computer science course.
reviews.review_text: Every need is on campus, so you don't have to move off the college campus. Even everyday scholars are allowed to stay at the hotel in case of an emergency. Hosts are only allowed to visit their home once a month. In case of an emergency, we have to contact the management office to pick up the hotel from there.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for M.Sc. in data science course.
reviews.review_text: Our library was operational and had air conditioning. It was maintained with great care to create a productive working and learning environment. We had canteens selling delicacies and a variety of messes. A well-equipped sports and fitness facility featuring treadmills, table tennis, badminton, and multiple playgrounds for outdoor activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was the best college for the MCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the classroom were mediocre. Wi-Fi was limited to libraries. Computer labs were useful. The canteen offered a lot of choices, but the flavor was mediocre, so I would give it an average grade of three. Among other things, the hospital provided good first aid kits. Football, cricket, and many other sports were given equal importance. Additionally, competitions were held to promote indoor games like chess.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was the best college for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the classroom were mediocre. Wi-Fi was limited to the libraries. Computer labs were useful. The canteen offered a lot of choices, but the flavor was mediocre, so I would give it an average grade of three. Among other things, the hospital provided good first aid kits. Football, cricket, and many other sports were given equal importance. Additionally, competitions were held to promote indoor games like chess.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for the M.Sc. in Data Science Course.
reviews.review_text: The college's biggest feature is its facilities. The Wi-Fi connection is flawless, and we can utilize the library's books whenever we want. Although the college does not offer hotel rooms, the food in the cafeteria is likewise excellent. The problems we encounter in college resolve right away. The campus is situated inside a stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for M.Sc. in data science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good and adequate. The laboratory, classrooms, and restrooms were quite well-equipped. Except for the library, there was no Wi-Fi available at the college. I am unable to remark on hostel meals because I did not stay there. However, the cuisine at the canteen was satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: A good and affordable college for MBA.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was very nice. All classrooms were well-maintained. There was a huge library. There were two boys’ hostels and one girls’ hostel on our campus. All the rooms were clean and spacious. They had attached washroom facilities. The food quality of the hostel mess was very good. Hostel rent was also affordable for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college timing is a major plus point, as you get lots of time to explore and study beyond.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice, but Wi-Fi doesn't work in most places. The library is a peaceful place, but lacks a book collection. The quality of food in the hostel is good, but as it repeats regularly, you'll get fed up soon because of the same taste. We have two canteens and one cafeteria. The cafeteria is good for breakfast and lunch, whereas the canteen is the best choice for snacks.

reviews.review_heading: A good college, but now it is strict compared to before.
reviews.review_text: We have smart classes with projectors, we have a language lab for language training, calligraphy classes, life skills classes with physical training, and NMEC courses for extra learning. The college hostel is good and the food is not very good but non-vegetarian food is very tasty. They have different blocks for different departments, chapel is there on the campus. Gym facility is available on the college campus, there are two playgrounds, and hostel students are allowed to use playgrounds durin...

individual_reviews.title: It is value for money, and it will be based upon the student's performance as the college is average

content.Placements: I belong to the 2023-2027 batch of the college. Currently, I am pursuing 2nd year of nursing from the college. There will be no campus placement from our college. The internship and practice will be done in the Nimra Hospital, which is under our college on our campus. The practice will be average, and students from our college will not join that hospital as we know all the things about it.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good with free Wi-Fi. The library is good with books. The infrastructure and classes are good. The campus environment is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: NIMRA Institute of Medical Sciences – Complete review

content.Placements: There were 150 students in our MBBS course. Nimra College has its own hospital, which gives us a 1-year internship after passing out of the 4th year. There, we have the Orthopedic, General Medicine, and Dermatology departments, etc. These help the students develop skills and knowledge practically and assist them in becoming good doctors.
content.Infrastructure: Campus of NIMS is quite large and offers different courses like B. Teach, D-Pharma, B. Pharma, BDS, Paramedicine, and Nursing, with separate buildings for each course. There are labs for Physiology, Biochemistry, Anatomy, Forensic Science, Microbiology, and a Community Medicine department. For MBBS, the institution has a library and more than 20 classrooms for teaching. In Nimra hostel, there are both AC and non-AC rooms, with separate buildings for girls and boys, and a common mess for students on campus. The campus also has 4 canteens, a professional cricket ground, a football ground, a basketball court, a kabaddi ground, a badminton court, and more.

reviews_list.review_title: Helpful faculties and a good environment for study. Need improvement in placement.

review_content.Placements: 30% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is 200000 per year package offered by college. The lowest is 140000 per year and the average is 160000 per year offered in my course. Top recruiting companies of my course are Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, Apollo, and Med Plus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are enough and clean; all students can comfortably sit in class. Wi-Fi is also available, but connectivity all over the building is not good. The library is good; all books are available for all subjects. Students can read books peacefully in the library. Mess food is not good. Sports events are also arranged in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is very good for admission to the Global College of Pharmaceutical Technology.

review_content.Placements: The placement provided by the college is annual. The overall package for students is 40,000 per year. But the placement helps the student a lot. Various companies came and gave the students the opportunity to serve their company. Medical jobs are done by the students in any kind of hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has various labs and a Wi-Fi system, and the classrooms are very large; 100 students can sit in the classroom at a time. The hostel provides excellent food quality. And the hostel is large in size and near the college, so it is very easy to reach the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of global college of pharmaceutical technology.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80 percent of the students were placed at our college. The highest package in our college is for students in 20LPA, and the lowest package is for 3LPA. Almost half of our students receive internships at our college, and we can also provide paid internships to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college hostels, one is a girls hostel and another is a boys hostel and you can also see the many outside hostels present beside the college campus. Almost all hostels provide good facilities like food, service and many other things.

content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in our course. The top recruitment company is Alchem. 90% of students got internships from our course in Dr. Reddy company. In our course, the top roles are QC and quality assurance.

Candidates looking for admission to Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity can apply online by visiting the official website of Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity.
STEP 2: Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity Selection Rounds
Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity admission to all the courses is direct. Candidates are selected based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity Final Seat Confirmation
Candidates after fulfilling the eligibility and selection criteria must pay a certain amount of fee to confirm their final seats.

Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity offers merit-based admission to BSc. faqs.question: How can I get admission to the Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity BSc course?
faqs.answer: To get admission to the BSc course at Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity students must have valid score in the past academic records. Early application can also help. The basic eligibility criteria is cleared Class 12 in Science with 50% aggregate. Bsc is provided for a duration of four years and is a full time course.

faqs.question: What is the total fee of the BSc course offered by Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity?
faqs.answer: Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity total fee of BSc is INR 6 Lacs it will include all kind of mandatory fee except application fee and prospectus fee. Candidates are required to pay a some amount of fee at the time of admission to lock their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Which courses are offered at Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity?
faqs.answer: Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity offers four-year full-time BSc courses to students. The total seat intake for the BSc course is180. BSc is provided in three specialisations, namelyMedical Laboratory Technology (MLT),Anaesthesia & Operation Theatre Technology (A&OTT).

faqs.question: What is the cutoff score required for admission to the Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity?
faqs.answer: Arka Jain University Powered by Emversity does not accept any entrance exam for admission to various courses. Admissions are completely merit based. Hence, cut off is not released by the college. college_info.college_name: Padmashree Group of Institutions

highlights.summary: Established in year 1996, Padmashree Group of Institutions is located in Bangalore city of Karnataka. Institute offers 7 courses which is Degree. Institute offers 4 UG and 3 PG courses available for aspiring students. Institute enjoys a good reputation for courses like MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., BBA, BHM in the streams of Business & Management Studies, Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, Hospitality & Travel. Students can opt courses from these as per their interest. Over the period, Padmashree Group of Institutions has gained expertize through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of HealthCare & Hospital, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Clinical Research. Courses offered by the Institute for total of 30 students. Institute has a well supported campus with facilities like Boys Hostel, Girls Hostel, Hostel, Labs, Library, Wi-Fi Campus.

faqs.answer: A:    Padmashree Group of Institutions helps students for career development through a specialised placement cell committed to securing internships and placements. Specifically, in the BSc curriculum at PGI, there is a structured curriculum for internships during the 8th semester. This internship period offers students practical exposure and hands-on experience in their respective fields of study, thereby enhancing their employability and preparing them for future professional endeavors.
faqs.question: Does Padmashree Group of Institutions provides internship for BSc students?

faqs.answer: A:    Completing the BSc nursing course at Padmashree Group of Institutions opens up a wide range of career opportunities likewise:Clinical PracticeStaff nurseNursing educator in hospitalInfection control nurse in pediatric hospital.Ward in–chargeNursing EducationLecturer in nursingAssistant professor in nursingAssociate professor in nursingHOD of DepartmentNursing AdministrationWard in–chargeShift in–chargeChief nursing officerPrincipal
faqs.question: What are the career opportunities after completing BSc course from Padmashree Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Padmashree Group of Institutions provides abroad placements and it depend on several factors such as the institution's partnerships with international companies, the demand for graduates in global markets, and individual student qualifications. Some of the names of the International hospitals for placements are Ministry of Health Saudi Arabia, Ministry of health in Kuwait, John Fawkner private hospital Australia, The Grove Elnhurs USA and many more.
faqs.question: Does Padmashree Group of Institutions provides abroad placements for BSc?

faqs.answer: A:    CAT is one of the accepting exams for admission to MBA programme at Padmashree Group of Institutions. However, it is not mandatory to have a CAT score for admission. The institute also considers scores in XAT, GMAT, NMAT or CMAT. Aspirants can also appear for Padmashree Entrance Test or PET for admission to MBA course.
faqs.question: Is CAT accepted at Padmashree Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Padmashree Group of Institutions conducts Padmashree Entrance Test or PET for admission to MBA programme. It is a online written test which can be taken by the aspirants. Those with a score in CAT, MAT, XAT or any other competitive exam are exempted from this. Selected candidates have to further pass presentation and personal interview round conducted in online/ offline mode for admission.
faqs.question: Does Padmashree Group of Institutions conduct entrance exam for MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants should have passed BCom degree examination from any recognised university with at least 50% aggregate in all the Commerce/ Management courses to apply for MCom programme at Padmashree Group of Institutions. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC/ ST/ Physically Challenged candidates.
faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for MCom at Padmashree Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    Padmashree Group of Institutions offers a wide range of undergraduate and postgraduate courses to the students. Candidates seeking admission to Padmashree Institute of Management and Sciences courses are required to fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria set by the college for the desired course. The fee for BSc courses offered here ranges between INR 1.4 Lacs to 2.8 lakh.

faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass entrance exam for admission to MBA programme. For all other courses, selection is merit-based. Candidates with a valid score in CAT, MAT, XAT, ATMA, GMAT, etc. can get admission in MBA programme. Aspirants can also appear for Padmashree Entrance Test or PET for MBA. Selected aspirants are further called for presentation and personal interview round for final selection.
faqs.question: Q: Is entrance exam required at Padmashree Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria various course-wise. Candidates must check the requirements for the preferred programme to apply for admission. Below is the eligibility for top courses at Padmashree Group of Institutions:CourseCommon EligibilityMSc (except Nursing)Graduation in relevant subject with at least 50% aggregateMBABachelor's degree in respective discipline with at least 50% aggregateBCAClass 12 or its equivalent in Science stream with at least 50% aggregateMPHBachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved categories).BSc (except Nursing)Class 12 or its equivalent in Science stream with at least 50% aggregateBComTwo year Pre-University course of Karnataka State or equivalent
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility for admission at Padmashree Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed two year Pre-University course of Karnataka State or equivalent are eligible to apply for BCom at Padmashree Group of Institutions. Aspirants should have relevant documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, the selection for BCom programme is merit-based.
faqs.question: Q: Who can apply for BCom at Padmashree Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: Padmashree Group of Institutions offers admission to most of the courses based on qualifying exam scores of the aspirants. For MBA admission, candidates need to provide a valid score in MAT, NMAT, CAT, GMAT, CMAT or XAT. Besides, aspirants without any score can appear for Padmashree Entrance Test or PET for admission. Selected candidates are further called for presentation and personal interview round. Once selected, aspirants receive an admission offer. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued(Oct 2025)- B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty. They teach and care about students.

content.Placements: As zoology is the first batch in the college, I don't know much about placements. After B.Sc in zoology, students tend to go for a master's. So placements are not much needed. If a student wants to join a research company, the college faculty will help you with the research papers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is good with unlimited water, food, and Wi-Fi. All seniors and juniors are respectful of you. We have to know how to be responsible and respectful. The is no problem with safety and sanitation if students behave themselves, follow the rules, and maintain discipline.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My experience is average.

content.Placements: For B.Sc., there is no placement opportunity, and there are no proper placement or internship facilities. They might help with it to find one but for that, we have to be behind teachers, so don't expect any placement from this college. Best of luck guys.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is fine. We get Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are decent but for the practical part chemicals and equipment are not proper. Campus is environment friendly but away from the city. Hostel is average but the food is not good. Hostel cost is Rs. 6,000, for 2 sharing.

content.Placements: The placement service at Padmashree Institute of Management & Science (PIMS) is quite recommendable. admission_overview.title: Padmashree Group of Institutions Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Padmashree Group of Institutions admissions are primarily based on merit. Candidates have to submit their qualifying exam scores to get a seat in the institute. The institute conducts Padmashree Entrance Test or PET for MBA programme. Padmashree Group of Institutions offers courses across various streams such as Nursing, Health Sciences, Management, Computer Applications, etc. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in affiliation with Bangalore University or Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences. Out of the offered programmes, MBA, MSc, BSc, BCA and BCom are popular among students. Interested candidates can fill out the application form for the preferred course on the institute's website.

admission_process.title: Padmashree Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Padmashree Group of Institutions admissionsare currently open for all the programmes. As per the official website, the institute selects candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Those who meet the criteria defined by the institute can join the preferred course. Below are the steps to get admission at Padmashree Group of Institutions:
Padmashree Group of Institutions Application Process

Candidates can fill out the form online or download the same from the institute's website. Aspirants have to upload documents such as marksheet, degree certificates, etc. while filling out the application form.

Once the institute receives the applications, the details of the aspirants are verified. For MBA, candidates need to provide a valid score in MAT,NMAT, CAT,GMAT, CMAT orXAT. Aspirants without any score can appear forPadmashree Entrance TestorPETfor admission. Selected candidates are further called for presentation and personal interview round for final selection.
Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

The institute releases admission offers for the shortlisted candidates. Those who are shortlisted are granted admission after the fee payment. Aspirants have to pay thePadmashree Group of Institutions feesto confirm their seat.

faqs.answer: Yes, Padmashree Group of Institutions conducts Padmashree Entrance Test or PET for admission to MBA programme. It is a online written test which can be taken by the aspirants.
