placement_data.title: Padmashree Group of Institutions Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the Shiksha Students Reviews page, the highest package offered during the Padmashree Group of Institution placements 2025 stood at INR 6 LPA. The average package offered was INR 2.18 LPA . Top recruiters include- LSEG, Accenture, Infosys , etc. Multiple job roles offered were HR, finance, marketing, logistics, supply chain, healthcare , etc. during the Padmashree Group of Institution placements 2025.

faqs.question: Does Padmashree Group of Institutions provides internship for BSc students?
faqs.answer: Padmashree Group of Institutions helps students for career development through a specialised placement cell committed to securing internships and placements. Specifically, in the BSc curriculum at PGI, there is a structured curriculum for internships during the 8th semester. This internship period offers students practical exposure and hands-on experience in their respective fields of study, thereby enhancing their employability and preparing them for future professional endeavors.

faqs.question: Does Padmashree Group of Institutions provides abroad placements for BSc?
faqs.answer: Yes, Padmashree Group of Institutions provides abroad placements and it depend on several factors such as the institution's partnerships with international companies, the demand for graduates in global markets, and individual student qualifications. Some of the names of the International hospitals for placements are Ministry of Health Saudi Arabia, Ministry of health in Kuwait, John Fawkner private hospital Australia, The Grove Elnhurs USA and many more.

faqs.question: How are BSc Placements at Padmashree Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Padmashree Group of Institutions provides 100% placement assistance to all eligible students. PGI Bangalore has a dedicated placement cell that conducts practical training sessions in order to help students grow professionally. Padmashree Group of Institutions BSc overall average package data is not released. According BSc, placement offered on previous year many students got chance in -Covance India Pharmaceutical Services Pvt Ltd, Dr. Lal Path Labs, Stelis Biopharma etc.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities after completing BSc course from Padmashree Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Completing the BSc nursing course at Padmashree Group of Institutions opens up a wide range of career opportunities likewise: Clinical Practice Staff nurse Nursing educator in hospital Infection control nurse in pediatric hospital. reviews.review_text: The physical infrastructure, such as the college building, laboratories, library, sports space, equipment, furnishings, parking space, etc., is present on the campus. The food quality in hostels may serve food that is prone to contamination and foodborne illnesses like diarrhea, typhoid, and jaundice. To ensure the safety of hostel food, the kitchen should be regularly inspected, and food should be tested. Mess prefects can report to the warden about the quality of food and cleanliness in the me...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 9 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am very happy and proud to be a student of Padmashree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with well-equipped laboratory instruments. Our classrooms are spacious and well-furnished. The library has various compartments to help with higher studies. The hostel is clean with good food. Cleanliness is maintained.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 25 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Education is Padmashree College.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and an environmentally pollution-free campus with a nice and big college. Classrooms are compacted with projectors for virtual presentations and also well-equipped laboratories. The hostel is very healthy and very neat with high-nutrient foods.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 25 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am happy because of the faculty members, the great infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: My institution is an excellent choice for students seeking quality education. There is free Wi-Fi. Labs are well-occupied and teachers are really helpful during practical hours. We have a very good library with a lot of books based on different departments. In the hostel, they serve good quality food and both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options are available. Additionally, they focus on extracurricular activities like cultural activities and sports also which help to develop our skills.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 21 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, satisfied with the college faculty and management.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent infrastructure for the food science course. The facilities were of good quality. Students had access to all the facilities available at the college. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a canteen, etc. facilities for the students. College canteen food was affordable and good to eat. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 8 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: PIMS Review: Infrastructure of the college is good; placement is not provided for our course.
reviews.review_text: Access to top-notch infrastructure and facilities, such as libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities, caters to all student needs. The combination of academic independence, a diverse teaching faculty, and a multicultural atmosphere fosters an environment that promotes the comprehensive growth of students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 5 Sep 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is not the best, but I am satisfied because of friendly faculty and relevant course.
reviews.review_text: Our department has a wide range of books and updated versions of equipment, which are exclusively used by food science and food processing students. All the classrooms have projectors and marker boards. Hostel rooms are spacious and cleaned regularly, but students must maintain cleanliness. The food served is healthy and delicious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 5 Sep 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has very calm surroundings. Our college is surrounded by greenery. It provides Wi-Fi on every floor. The library has a very good collection of books. It has syllabus-related books and novels. The hostel is good. Its rooms are neat.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 24 Mar 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms, computer labs, and science labs are kept clean and tidy. We are provided with course-related references and textbooks in the library. As for sports and games, opportunities are provided for students to participate in various games conducted outside or inside the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Padmashree Institute of Management and SciencesReviewed on 22 Mar 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our campus has good environment, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and for our practicals, we have good laboratory facilities. The college is maintained in good hygienic conditions and an eco-friendly environment. The hostel facility in our college is good. They provide breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner.
